description: Consolidated schema registry for all 7 monitors. Defines every report field, its source (synthesis / persistent-state / publisher / carry-forward), the dashboard section that renders it, and the synthesis-to-report field mapping. The publisher and preflight checks validate against this file.

field_sources.synthesis: Produced by the synthesiser each week
field_sources.publisher-build: Computed by publisher.py at publish time
field_sources.carry-forward: Carried from previous report if synthesis doesn't provide it
field_sources.analyst-legacy: Originally produced by analyst cron; now carry-forward until synthesis covers it

meta.notes: Built by publisher from previous meta + synthesis _meta

signal.notes: Sprint v2: lead_signal now produced by synthesis. Publisher builds signal from lead_signal + stress_regime_preliminary.

executive_briefing.gap: Not produced by synthesis. Should be partially derivable from stress_regime_preliminary + indicator_domains. Requires synthesis prompt extension.
executive_briefing.notes: Key dashboard section — shows stress label, scenarios, regime probabilities

stress_regime.notes: Sprint v2: regime, conviction, system_average now included in stress_regime_preliminary. Publisher maps to stress_regime.

domain_indicators.notes: Sprint v2: all 24 indicators with flag, direction, type, value now produced by synthesis.

indicator_domains.notes: 6 domain summaries from synthesis. Different from domain_indicators (detailed per-indicator).

key_judgments.notes: Synthesis produces with confidence_preliminary; publisher strips _preliminary suffix

debt_dynamics.notes: Sprint v2: entity-level debt/GDP, deficit, trajectory now produced by synthesis.

credit_stress.notes: Sprint v2: segment-level stress with contagion risk now produced by synthesis.

systemic_risk.notes: Sprint v2: risk with transmission channel and monitoring indicator now produced by synthesis.

asset_outlook.notes: Sprint v2: 8 asset classes with scoring_breakdown, conviction, blind_spot_warning now produced by synthesis.

safe_haven.notes: Sprint v2: gold_thesis, bonds_note, cash_note now produced by synthesis.

sentiment_overlay.notes: Sprint v2: fed_funds_futures, matt_agreement_pct now produced by synthesis.

cross_monitor_flags.notes: Publisher promotes candidates, verifies existing flags against adjacent reports

weekly_brief.gap: Publisher writes Hugo brief but does NOT write weekly_brief to report JSON. Bug — weekly_brief_draft should be mapped to weekly_brief in the report.
weekly_brief.notes: Currently carries forward from previous report in the JSON

source_url.notes: Set by publisher to the Hugo brief URL

scenario_framework.notes: Sprint v2: 3 scenarios (Slow Burn, De-escalation, Fast Cascade) with probability weights. Pass-through from synthesis.

positioning_overlay.notes: Sprint v2: MATT framework positioning overlay + contrarian corner + fed funds futures. Pass-through from synthesis.

credit_spreads.description: Add to prompt; render spread chart on dashboard

vix_term_structure.description: Add array to prompt; render curve chart

tariff_quantification.description: Structured tariff impact field; render as annotated figure

file_paths._note: Canonical file locations for schema sprint and pipeline work

signal.notes: Publisher builds signal from synthesis lead_signal via signal_key config

campaigns.notes: Publisher merges persistent-state campaigns with synthesis delta_strip

attribution_log.notes: Publisher merges new entries from synthesis with existing log

cognitive_warfare.notes: Publisher builds from synthesis intelligence_highlights and high-confidence key_judgments

weekly_brief.gap: Same as GMM — not written to report JSON

key_judgments.notes: Sprint v1: analytical judgments with MF-flag annotations and trajectory

intelligence_highlights.notes: Sprint v1: novel TTPs, cross-platform coordination, narrative persistence, attribution gaps

narratives_registry.description: New top-level object; render as table

file_paths._note: Canonical file locations for schema sprint and pipeline work

signal.notes: Sprint v2: signal now produced by synthesis with headline, body, source_url.

institutional_integrity_flags.notes: Sprint v2: 4 signal types tracked from synthesis.

key_judgments.notes: Sprint v2: analytical judgments with country-level democratic health assessments

mimicry_chain_update.notes: Sprint v2: new field — autocratic legislative model export chains.

legislative_watch_entries.notes: Sprint v2: new field — bills/EOs/regulatory actions with lifecycle tracking.

friction_notes.notes: Sprint v2: new field — official vs ground-truth divergences.

intelligence_highlights.notes: Sprint v2: WDM maps backsliding_alerts → intelligence_items. intelligence_highlights alias added for cross-monitor template compatibility

m03_threat_multiplier.notes: DEPRECATED v2.2: replaced by synthesis-named field. Will be removed after migration.

extreme_events_log.notes: Sprint v2: now produced by synthesis with non-linear departure test.

icj_tracker.notes: Sprint v2: standing tracker — published every week.

loss_damage_tracker.notes: Sprint v2: standing tracker — disbursement vs commitment.

attribution_gap_cases.notes: Sprint v2: F4 attribution gap — novel entities, deep-sea mining, aerosol, microplastics.

reverse_cascade_check.notes: Sprint v2: mandatory weekly — does geopolitical event accelerate boundary transgression.

planetary_status_snapshot.notes: v2.2: replaces legacy m00_the_signal. Contains boundaries_exceeded, high_risk, increasing_risk, safe counts, status_delta_this_week, lead_signal

planetary_boundary_tracker.notes: v2.2: replaces legacy m02_planetary_boundaries. 9 boundaries with status, delta, key_indicator, data_source, week_development, filter_tags

tipping_point_tracker.notes: v2.2: tipping elements with proximity, probability, cascade_risk, amoc_fovs_proxy

climate_security_nexus.notes: v2.2: replaces legacy m03_threat_multiplier. Risk items with type, region, severity, conflict_link, scem_link, cascade_chain

regional_coverage.notes: v2.2: FM-ERM-02 compliance — sub_saharan_africa, mena, south_asia, ocean_systems item counts

key_judgments.notes: v2.2: analyst judgments with id, judgment, confidence_preliminary, boundary_or_element, trajectory

cross_monitor_candidates.notes: v2.2: signals for routing to other monitors. target_monitor, signal, type, confidence

synthesis_gaps: m01_executive_insight deprecated — no synthesis equivalent, carried forward only
m06-m08 deprecated — AI/biosphere/geostrategic not yet from synthesis

european-strategic-autonomy.known_issues: Publisher now extracts lead_signal to signal. Synthesis v2.1 covers all target fields.

conflict_roster.notes: Sprint v2: full roster with entry dates, structural breaks, baseline recalc.

roster_watch.notes: Sprint v2: approaching inclusion and retirement.

indicator_scoring.notes: Sprint v2: I1-I6 per-theatre scoring with deviation from baseline.

f_flag_matrix.notes: Sprint v2: F1-F4 disinformation pattern detection per theatre.

acled_reference.notes: Sprint v2: biannual ACLED Conflict Index alignment. Preserved across weekly runs.

global_escalation_snapshot.notes: Active theatre count, escalations/de-escalations, highest intensity, lead signal summary.

theatre_tracker.notes: Per-theatre intensity, delta, ACLED counts, ceasefire status, hybrid dimensions.

escalation_indicators.notes: Kinetic/political/hybrid/nuclear/economic indicators per theatre with thresholds.

hybrid_warfare_layer.notes: FIMI/cyber/proxy/economic coercion developments per theatre with FCW cross-links.

key_judgments.notes: Analytical key judgments with confidence and trajectory per theatre.

cross_monitor_candidates.notes: Signals for routing to other monitors (FCW, WDM, ESA, GMM, ERM).

macro-monitor.sprint_note: Schema sprint v2: 44% → 75%. Executive briefing still partially analyst-legacy. Signal now from synthesis.

fimi-cognitive-warfare.sprint_note: Schema sprint v2: 67% → 85%. Full prompt built from scratch. Only platform_responses remains persistent-state.

democratic-integrity.sprint_note: Schema sprint v2: 86% → 92%. Added institutional_integrity, mimicry_chain, legislative_watch, friction_notes, signal.

environmental-risks.sprint_note: Schema sprint v2: 40% → 67%. Added extreme_events, policy_law, icj_tracker, loss_damage, attribution_gap, reverse_cascade.

european-strategic-autonomy.sprint_note: Schema sprint v2: 17% → 65%. Prompt expanded with election_threat, lagrange_point, state_capture, domain_tracker.

conflict-escalation.sprint_note: Schema sprint v3: 60% → 85%. Added global_escalation_snapshot, theatre_tracker, escalation_indicators, hybrid_warfare_layer, key_judgments, cross_monitor_candidates. JSON enforcement added.
